description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a unittesting job that runs pip install -r requirements.txt, pip install -r dev-requirements.txt, coverage run setup.py test, coverage html, and coverage report, and stores the coverage_html_report/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs python -V, pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material, mkdocs build, and moves coverage_html_report/ to public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on tags. Also in the deploy stage add a pypi job that runs python -V, apt update && apt -y install pandoc, pip install pypandoc pandoc, creates a ~/.pypirc file using the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD variables, executes python setup.py check sdist upload -r pypi, then removes the .pypirc file, and runs only on tags to publish the package to PyPI.
